title: fem2geo: Physics-Based Modeling to Structural Geology and Seismology

creators.name: Massiot, Cécile
creators.affiliation: GNS Science | Te Pū Ao, Lower Hutt, New Zealand

creators.name: Ruz, Javiera
creators.affiliation: Geology Department, University of Otago, Dunedin, New Zealand

description: fem2geo is a Python library for structural geology and seismology analyses on outputs from finite element (FEM) or boundary element (BEM) numerical models. It loads simulation outputs, extracts regions of interest, computes geomechanical variables (principal stress directions, slip and dilation tendency), and produces stereonet figures. Standard workflows run from a YAML config file; a Model class is available for scripting. Source code and tutorials: https://github.com/pabloitu/fem2geo.
